remediation_checklist.action: Inventory in-scope UST cash and repo activity (bilateral + triparty) and quantify cleared vs uncleared notional.
Select an access model (Direct vs Sponsored done-with vs Agent done-away) — run tcm-access-model.
Establish CCP initial-margin funding capability and HQLA inventory — run tcm-repo-margin.
Execute clearing/sponsorship agreements and stand up CCP/triparty/vendor connectivity — run tcm-onboarding.
Stress intraday liquidity for meeting CCP margin calls — run tcm-liquidity.

ccp_selection.note: FICC (DTCC) is the UST cash/repo CCP under the mandate. CMESC/ICE Clear Credit clear adjacent products (rates futures / credit), relevant for cross-margin context, not as UST cash/repo alternates.

output_payload.note: Educational readiness diagnostic for the SEC US Treasury clearing mandate. Routes to the relevant tcm-* chain; not legal or clearing advice.
